label: Entity codex entry
description: Defines an entry in the Anomaly entity codex, linking a discovered entity to its category, description, icon, and related incidents and research.

category.label: Category
category.description: EntityCategoryDef that groups this entry in the entity codex UI. Required: game reports a config error if null.

startDiscovered.label: Start discovered
startDiscovered.description: If true, this codex entry is revealed at game start without the player having encountered the entity.

linkedThings.label: Linked things
linkedThings.description: ThingDefs associated with this codex entry. ResolveReferences back-links each ThingDef.entityCodexEntry to this def.

linkedIncidents.label: Linked incidents
linkedIncidents.description: IncidentDefs associated with this codex entry. Private in source but loaded from XML. ResolveReferences back-links each IncidentDef.codexEntry to this def.

discoveredResearchProjects.label: Discovered research projects
discoveredResearchProjects.description: ResearchProjectDefs that are unlocked automatically when this codex entry is discovered.

provocationIncidents.label: Provocation incidents
provocationIncidents.description: IncidentDefs that can trigger when this entity is provoked.

discoveryType.label: Discovery type
discoveryType.description: Determines what event triggers discovery of this codex entry.

allowDiscoveryWhileMapGenerating.label: Allow discovery while map generating
allowDiscoveryWhileMapGenerating.description: If true, this codex entry can be discovered during initial map generation (before the player gains control).

orderInCategory.label: Order in category
orderInCategory.description: Sort position of this entry within its category in the entity codex. Lower values appear first.

hideInPlaystyles.label: Hide in playstyles
hideInPlaystyles.description: AnomalyPlaystyleDefs for which this codex entry is hidden. The entry remains absent from the codex when the active playstyle is in this list.

useDescriptionFrom.label: Use description from
useDescriptionFrom.description: ThingDef whose description is shown for this codex entry instead of the entry's own description field. Private in source but loaded from XML.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Asset path for the codex entry icon texture. PostLoad derives the silhouette texture by appending _Silhouette. Private in source but loaded from XML. Required: game reports a config error if missing.

basic-codex-entry.label: Basic codex entry
basic-codex-entry.description: Minimal entity codex entry with required fields and a description.

linked-thing-codex-entry.label: Linked thing codex entry
linked-thing-codex-entry.description: Entity codex entry linked to one or more ThingDefs, with description sourced from a linked thing.
